gameDetails.name: Mage Knight Board Game
gameDetails.description:
In Mage Knight Board Game you become one of four powerful Mage Knights who explore and subdue an important peninsula of the Atlantean Empire. Learn skills, gather an army, pack your deck with powerful spells and abilities as you conquer castles, battle dragons, and clear out dungeons, swelling with power until you're ready to assault the mighty heartland cities of the Atlanteans. Work with other Mage Knights--or bash them aside--as you wrestle your way into power. Play competitively, play cooperatively, play solo--only be sure to win.

So come, slip through the portal into a standalone game rich in role-playing, deck-building, and map exploration. Immerse yourself in the lush tapestry of the Mage Knight universe as you race toward danger, making the most of each choice, each card, each clash.
